en.text: a primitive root (compare H2283, H2328); properly, to move in acircle, i.e. (specifically) to march in asacred procession, to observe afestival; by implication, to be giddy

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root (compare H2283, H2328); properly, to move in acircle, i.e. (specifically) to march in asacred procession, to observe afestival; by implication, to be giddy
